title: Bedwars Enhanced
description: A modpack to help improve the performance of you bedwars experience!
body: Do you play bedwars, but you want to improve? I can't make you a pro, but I can certainly help! Already skilled or brand new to bedwars, this pack will certainly help. It has performance enhancers, resource packs, auto gg's, and more! This modpack has been optimized for Hypixel, but this pack still works on other servers!
